creator: corecode@corecode.ath.cx
text:
wmcube-gdk is vulnerable to a local exploit resulting in priority elevation (to gid kmem)

see: http://www.securityfocus.com/archive/1/246033

Fix: there might still be some problems as i didn't have much time to audit the source code.
better than nothing
How-To-Repeat: make & install wmcube-gdk
